---
id: get-region-by-realm-country
title: "Get Region list based on RealmCountry list"
description: "API used to get the Region list for a list of RealmCountry Ids. Empty list means you want the complete list of Regions"
sidebar_label: "Get Region list based on RealmCountry list"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/generated/api/v2.12/quantification-and-analytics-tool
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Region list based on RealmCountry list"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/region/realmCountryId/{realmCountryId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



API used to get the Region list for a list of RealmCountry Ids. Empty list means you want the complete list of Regions

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"realmCountryId","in":"path","description":"RealmCountryId that you want the Region list for","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Returns the Region list based on the RealmCountry that was passed","content":{"text/json":{}}},"403":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN if the User does not have access","content":{"text/json":{}}},"404":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND if the RealmId specified does not exist","content":{"text/json":{}}},"500":{"description":"Internal error that prevented the retreival of Region list","content":{"text/json":{}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
